---
title: "0_H2 Setup"
author: "Kate McDaniel"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
Work based off of DESeq2 vingette, and the DEtutorial on the nextflow nf-core/rnaseq site https://nf-co.re/rnaseq/3.22.1/docs/usage/differential_expression_analysis/de_rstudio#

###Pulling in data and getting it organized

```{r, pulling in appropriate file CAN CHANGE, include = FALSE}
path <- c("H2_final_2/star_salmon/deseq2_qc/deseq2.dds.RData")
celltype <- "H2"
contrast_list <- c("NT", "NL3FL", "NL3dICD", "NL3ICD")
contrast <- "NT"

#number of conditions
number <- 4
```

```{r, loading packages and setting directory to save to, include = FALSE}
library("DESeq2")
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library("ggrepel")
library("ashr")
library("writexl")
library("biomaRt")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("clusterProfiler")
library("tidyverse")
library("kableExtra")
library("export")
library("webshot2")
library("officer")
library("msigdbr")
library("DOSE")
library("magick")
library("beepr")


basewd <- "/KM_Pipeline"
dir.create(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/",contrast))
setwd(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/",contrast))
```

```{r, call script to set up dds according to contrast, echo = FALSE}
#review this output to make sure it's okay
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/A_Set up dds_H2.R"))

#want to use dds_final out of this if you need to do anything
```

```{r, call script to do visualizations - PCA and distance, echo = FALSE}
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/B_Vis for overall comparisons_H2.R"))
```

```{r, create main tables for each comparison, echo = FALSE}
#normalized counts, results, and results with lfc shrink (each tab has a comparison)
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/C_Main Tables_H2.R"))

```


```{r, each comparison}
#change this for the files for the specific comparisons
want = "NL3FL"
  
  
#setting up directory
dir.create(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/",contrast, "/", "vs. ", want))
setwd(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/",contrast, "/", "vs. ", want))


#ORA and GSEA prep - getting all the lists
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/E_ORA and GSEA Prep_H2.R"))

#running ORA for GO and KEGG pathways 
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/F_ORA_H2.R"))


#GSEA set up and run
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/I_GSEA Set up and Run_H2.R"))


#DOSE set up, ORA, and tables
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/K_DOSE Set up_H2.R"))
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/L_DOSE ORA_H2.R"))


#DOSE GSEA set up, GSEA, and tables
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/N_DOSE GSEA Set up and Run_H2.R"))

##Can do further visualizations from here


```


```{r, tables - only have to run once per comparison}
#table of top 15 most significant genes
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/D_15 Sig Table_H2.R"))

#get tables and data for ORA pathways
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/G_ORA GO Tables_H2.R"))
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/H_ORA KEGG Tables_H2.R"))


#GSEA tables
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/J_GSEA Tables_H2.R"))

##DOSE
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/M_DOSE ORA Tables_H2.R"))
source(paste0(basewd,"/",celltype,"/R files", "/O_DOSE GSEA Tables_H2.R"))

```
